name: tn16-ecommerce-app
description: TN16 Full-Stack Ecommerce Application - Frontend (React/Vite) + Backend (Express/Node)

scripts.install-all: npm run install-frontend && npm run install-backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd ecommerce-backend && npm run dev" "cd ecommerce-frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build-frontend && npm run build-backend
scripts.build-backend: echo 'Backend is Node.js - no build needed'
scripts.start: concurrently "cd ecommerce-backend && npm start" "cd ecommerce-frontend && npm run preview"
scripts.clean: rimraf ecommerce-backend/node_modules ecommerce-frontend/node_modules package-lock.json ecommerce-backend/package-lock.json ecommerce-frontend/package-lock.json
scripts.clean-full: npm run clean && rimraf ecommerce-backend/dist ecommerce-frontend/dist

author: TN16
